name: Buchan, Rebecca
evidence: Out-of-state donor from Holladay, UT (SLC suburb, zip 84117) who gave $2,500 to Ann Howard; no occupation/employer reported and no FEC history. Multiple Rebecca Buchans exist in the SLC area (a prominent hospitality/restaurant interior designer at Denton House/Areté Collective, plus a local Realtor). None can be confirmed as this specific donor, so no industry is assigned.

name: LaMantia, Lauren
resolved_employer: Favorite Brands / L&F Distributors (LaMantia family beer, wine & spirits distributorship)
evidence: Self-reported as 'Beer Manager' at 'Favorite Brands,' the beer/wine/spirits wholesale distributor owned by the LaMantia family; lives in Alamo Heights (78209), the affluent San Antonio suburb where Favorite Brands operates. The LaMantia family has run Texas alcohol distribution (L&F Distributors, an Anheuser-Busch house since 1978, plus Favorite Brands from 2011) for 40+ years. Occupation + employer + location together confirm she is a member/employee of the family beverage-distribution business. 49 prior FEC gifts, slightly Democratic lean.

name: Bouchard, CJ
resolved_employer: Excel Fitness Holdings (CEO) — one of the largest Planet Fitness franchisees, Austin-based
evidence: CEO of Excel Fitness (employer string 'Excel'), an Austin-headquartered Planet Fitness franchisee operating 160+ gyms across the South/Southeast; CEO since 2021, in the Planet Fitness system since 2006. Austin 78731 matches. Industry labeled Retail as the closest fit for a consumer fitness/gym operator (no dedicated fitness/consumer-services taxonomy label).

name: Roski, Edward
resolved_employer: Majestic Realty Co. (President/Chairman) — largest privately held U.S. industrial real estate developer
evidence: Edward P. Roski Jr., billionaire president/chairman of City of Industry-based Majestic Realty (92M+ sq ft of industrial property); part-owner of the LA Kings and Lakers. Donor zip 91746 = City of Industry, CA, Majestic's home base, confirming identity. Gave $2,500 to Jeff Travillion. (Also a decorated Marine Corps Vietnam combat veteran — Bronze Star, two Purple Hearts — noted for context; he is a real-estate developer, not a defense contractor.)

name: Varma, Samit
resolved_employer: SKV Consulting Inc. (CEO), Austin business-consulting firm
evidence: Samit Varma (b. 1977) is CEO of SKV Consulting Inc., a Texas-registered business consulting firm at 12201 Musket Rim St, Austin 78738 — the exact donor zip. Public records place his residence in 78738, corroborating identity even though the county record left occupation blank. Gave $2,500 to Ann Howard. (A same-named Samit Varma is CEO of Vironexis Biotherapeutics in Woodland Hills, CA — a different person.)

name: Weston, Kristin
resolved_employer: Thoma Bravo (Operating Partner) — software-focused private equity firm
evidence: Kristin Nimsger Weston has been an Operating Partner at Thoma Bravo (large software/tech private-equity firm) since Nov 2020; prior CEO of Vista Equity portfolio companies (MicroEdge, Social Solutions) and president of Kroll Ontrack. Costa Mesa, CA 78209... zip 92627 matches Costa Mesa. Self-reported 'Operating Partner / Thoma Bravo' matches exactly. Gave $2,500 to Andy Brown.

name: Paul Chope
resolved_employer: Linebarger Goggan Blair & Sampson, LLP (attorney) — municipal tax/debt collection law firm
evidence: Self-reported as 'Attorney at Law' at Linebarger, Goggan, Blair & Sampson, LLP, the large Austin-based firm that handles government/municipal tax and delinquent-debt collection; lives in West Lake Hills (78746). The self-reported occupation/employer reliably places him in Legal. Note: no Texas attorney named 'Paul Chope' could be independently verified; the firm's Austin managing partner is Paul D. name: Carol Guthrie
resolved_employer: AFSCME Texas Local 1624 (business manager) — public-employees labor union
evidence: Carol Guthrie is the longtime business manager of AFSCME Local 1624, the Austin/Travis County public-employees union, and a well-known Austin-area Democratic/labor figure who publicly backed Commissioner Margaret Gómez — the exact candidate she gave $2,500 to. 121 prior FEC gifts with a fully Democratic lean corroborate. Progressive/labor money.
